artefact_payload: Based on the Holt architecture documentation, you should use the M3.3 automated feedback loop for iterative refinement. The max_review_iterations configuration in holt.yml controls how many rework cycles are allowed before the workflow terminates with a Failure artefact. The default is 3 iterations, which balances quality improvement with preventing infinite loops.
summary: ArchitectGemini: Answered technical question about rework limits
